heading: Stream Processor States
body:
Stream processors transition between different states throughout their lifecycle. Understanding these states helps you monitor and troubleshoot your stream processing operations.

Possible states include:

| State        | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| RUNNING      | The stream processor is actively processing data and operating normally. This is the desired operational state where your processor consumes data from sources, applies transformations, and writes to sinks.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| STOPPED      | The stream processor has been manually stopped and is not processing data. To learn how to start a stream processor, see Start a Stream Processor.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| PROVISIONING | The stream processor is in the process of allocating resources or scaling infrastructure.Common causes include:Starting a new stream processor that requires additional worker resourcesScaling operations when existing workers are at capacityInfrastructure rebalancing during peak usage periodsAutomatic resource provisioning triggered by workload demandsStream Processing Workspace tier changes requiring resource reallocationPotential impacts include:Temporary delay in stream processor startup (typically 2-5 minutes)Brief interruption in data processing during transitionsOnce provisioning completes, processes resume automatically. No data loss occurs, as Atlas Stream Processing preserves state through checkpoints. |
| FAILED       | The stream processor has encountered an error that prevents it from running. This occurs due to user errors or configuration issues. For detailed information about failure causes and recovery, see Error Handling and Retry Policies.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

> **Note:** Stream processors might appear intermittently in PROVISIONING state in monitoring dashboards as the system allocates resources. This is normal behavior during scaling operations. If a processor remains in PROVISIONING state for extended periods (>10 minutes), check your stream processing workspace resource limits and tier configuration.
